     The Numbers Business Report

Savages (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,323,100Details
International Box Office $35,190,390
Worldwide Box Office $82,513,490
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,115,148
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,619,648
Total $14,734,796
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Laguna Beach entrepreneurs Ben, a peaceful and charitable marijuana producer, and his closest friend Chon, a former Navy SEAL and ex-mercenary, run a lucrative, homegrown industry-raising some of the best weed ever developed. They also share a one-of-a-kind love with the extraordinary beauty Ophelia. Life is idyllic in their Southern California town... until the Mexican Baja Cartel decides to move in and demands that the trio partners with them. When the merciless head of the BC, Elena, and her brutal enforcer, Lado (Del Toro), underestimate the unbreakable bond among these three friends, Ben and Chon--with the reluctant, slippery assistance of a dirty DEA agent--wage a seemingly unwinnable war against the cartel. And so begins a series of increasingly vicious ploys and maneuvers in a high-stakes, savage battle of wills.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,016,910 (33.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.95 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,628 opening theaters/2,635 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $71,103,551

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 6th, 2012 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 13th, 2012 (Wide) (Turkey)
July 13th, 2012 (Wide) (Mexico)
August 3rd, 2012 (Wide) (Colombia)
August 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (Taiwan)
August 30th, 2012 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: November 13th, 2012 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong brutal and grisly violence, some graphic sexuality, nudity, drug use and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2218, 4/11/2012)
Running Time: 130 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Kidnap, Love Triangle, Narcotics, Rescue, Returning Soldiers, Revenge
Social setting: Film Noir, Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Relativity Media, Moritz Borman
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Laguna Beach entrepreneurs Ben, a peaceful and charitable marijuana producer, and his closest friend Chon, a former Navy SEAL and ex-mercenary, run a lucrative, homegrown industry-raising some of the best weed ever developed. They also share a one-of-a-kind love with the extraordinary beauty Ophelia. Life is idyllic in their Southern California town... until the Mexican Baja Cartel decides to move in and demands that the trio partners with them. When the merciless head of the BC, Elena, and her brutal enforcer, Lado (Del Toro), underestimate the unbreakable bond among these three friends, Ben and Chon--with the reluctant, slippery assistance of a dirty DEA agent--wage a seemingly unwinnable war against the cartel. And so begins a series of increasingly vicious ploys and maneuvers in a high-stakes, savage battle of wills.
